example_tasks: Compare two versions of the document
Toggle between light and dark mode
Reverse the order of the list
Flip the orientation of the layout
Toggle the visibility of the sidebar
Split the project into two phases
Compare the old and new policy
reasoning: The icon is highly abstract and primarily functions as a UI navigation or layout control glyph (e.g., expand/collapse or split view). It lacks a clear, concrete semantic meaning that would help a user distinguish between different types of productivity tasks at a glance.
